phase: Phase 3 — MFA-integratie LIVE: TOTP setup/verify/disable + magic-link via Gmail SMTP + AES-GCM-encrypted-at-rest TOTP-secret + MFA-gate op vault-routes
kdf_in_use: AES-KDF (KDBX-spec-conform). Argon2id-bridge staat klaar; full re-enable verschoven naar v0.0.5+ na KeePassXC-CLI oracle-test in Fase 5.

mfa.magic_link: 32-byte urlsafe token, 10 min, single-use via Gmail SMTP_SSL
mfa.secret_at_rest: AES-GCM-encrypted (12-byte nonce + ciphertext + tag) met HORSESAFE_TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY
